heading: Instructions for United States Director
label: 290k–2 Instructions for United States Director
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 405 of title IV of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Dec. 11, 1987Pub. L. 100–202

children.text: be in any country which has not taken or is not taking steps to afford internationally recognized workers’ rights to workers in that country;

children.label: A
children.text: employment in the United States or other member countries; or

children.label: B
children.text: other trade benefits likely to accrue to the United States or other member countries from the investment; or

increase a country’s productive capacity in an industry already facing excess worldwide capacity for the same, similar or competing product, and cause substantial injury to producers of such product in another member country.
